reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del empleado como así también de las chicas que atienden el maxiquiosco sorprendiéndome por el servicio de agua caliente sin cargo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff as well as from the girls who work at the kiosk, surprising me with the free hot water service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoXy1pRkhnEAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar estaba limpio y tenés variedad de comida por ejemplo empanadas, tartas, sandwich y podés pedir hamburguesas, después tenés todo lo común de las estaciones de servicio. Los baños estaban funcionando todos y había papel

(Translated by Google)
The place was clean and they had a variety of food, for example empanadas, tarts, sandwiches, and you can order hamburgers. They also had all the usual gas station supplies. All the restrooms were working and there was toilet paper.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNkpQZW5RRRAB

reviews.comment:
El playero muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
The beachman was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSOE1EbGxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuve de paso desayunando, cafe con leche y medialunas. Como todas las estaciones YPF  full te cobran un poquito de mas.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by for breakfast, coffee with milk and croissants. Like all full YPF stations, they charge a little more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSa0tQdV93RRAB
